name: math
description: A displayed LaTeX equation (latexmath) + an AsciiMath summation, each rendered by the MathJax shim to a self-contained SVG the engine embeds. asciidoctor-mathematical does not build on this platform, so the reference is the external Asciidoctor-PDF gem embedding the SAME shim-produced SVG assets (see reference-build/); the parity under test is therefore the wasm engine's SVG placement vs the reference gem's. MathJax emits glyph paths (no text layer), so parity is measured by a rasterized ink-map: same page count, math ink present, and the inked region's footprint + position within element-level tolerance (the tolerance absorbs the two engines' rasterizer antialiasing).
